sourceMovie.title: Top Secret!
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Top Secret! works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Scary Movie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Top Secret! clicked for you, Scary Movie (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Top Secret!?
faq.answer: Try Scary Movie, Knight and Day, Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls—each shares DNA with Top Secret! while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Top Secret!?
faq.answer: Top Secret! (1984) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Top Secret! worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
